creator: lbolmerg@web.de
text:
portupgrade of gtkam from release 0.1.13_1 to 0.1.14 fails with

libtool: link: cannot find the library `/usr/X11R6/lib/libgtk-x11-2.0.la' or unhandled argument `/usr/X11R6/lib/libgtk-x11-2.0.la'

#pkg_info -W /usr/local/lib/libgtk-x11-2.0.la
/usr/local/lib/libgtk-x11-2.0.la was installed by package gtk-2.10.9_1
